footer.tagline: Your technology partner for real-world business. From system development and web apps to on-site integration, we help organizations turn ideas into stable, working systems.

partners.subtitle: Powered by the world's leading technology ecosystem to give your product the strongest backing

hero.badge: Your technology partner for real-world business
hero.lead: Whether it's a government project, enterprise transformation, or O2O integration for physical spaces — we don't just write code, we know how to make systems run reliably in the real world.

services.title: End-to-End Digital Solutions
services.subtitle: From system development to on-site integration, we provide one-stop technical services that help organizations turn ideas into stable, working systems.
services.ctaCardDesc: Tell us what you need and our consultants will help you clarify direction and assess feasibility.

ai.subtitle: From generative-AI customer service to smart customer acquisition, we turn the latest AI technology into products and services that are genuinely usable and deliver results.

products.title: Our Products
products.subtitle: Beyond custom development, we build our own SaaS products — from e-commerce and AI customer service to smart customer acquisition — to help businesses upgrade across the board.

insights.title: Insights
insights.subtitle: Stay on top of industry trends and hands-on perspectives in security, architecture, AI and more.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: Four clear, transparent steps — from the first chat to long-term operations, we're with you the whole way.

cta.title: Got an idea and looking for someone to build it with?
cta.subtitle: Whether it's a brand-new system, an upgrade of an old one, or on-site integration — let's talk, and we'll evaluate your project for free.

seo.title: JWisdom｜AIoT Experts · Software Development & System Integration
seo.ogTitle: JWisdom｜Your Technology Partner for Real-World Business
seo.desc: JWisdom is your technology partner for real-world business — software development, web & app design, government and education systems, AI integration and digital marketing — helping enterprises turn ideas into stable, working systems.

products.name: IoT Shop
products.desc: A one-stop shop for maker and IoT electronic parts — Raspberry Pi, Arduino, ESP, Jetson, sensors and modules of all kinds, covering everything from prototyping to mass production.

products.name: ChatAI Realistic CS
products.desc: An AI-powered realistic customer-service platform that integrates LINE and other channels, with 24/7 automated replies, bookings and lead management — so service never sleeps.

products.name: AutoGrowth
products.desc: An AI-powered customer-acquisition and growth system: automatic short-video generation, review and reputation management, hot-lead analysis and automated follow-up sequences — turning traffic into repeat customers.

why.title: Strategy First
why.desc: We clarify your business goals and use cases before choosing the technology, so we never build a system no one uses.

why.title: Solid Engineering
why.desc: A full-stack in-house team across front-end, back-end, cloud and AI — no outsourcing, no bottlenecks.

why.title: Built to Ship
why.desc: We understand the realities of the field, so systems run stably, work well and stay maintainable on-site.

why.title: Long-Term Partner
why.desc: After delivery, we keep supporting you from operations to optimization — growing the system together.

process.title: Discovery
process.desc: We dive into your business goals, use cases and pain points, and assess feasibility for free.

process.title: Planning & Design
process.desc: We propose the system architecture, workflows and interface design, then start once direction and timeline are confirmed.

process.title: Development
process.desc: Agile, iterative development with a transparent process and progress you can check anytime, ensuring on-time delivery.

process.title: Operations & Optimization
process.desc: Launch isn't the end — we keep monitoring, maintaining and optimizing, helping you nurture the system.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.seoDesc: JWisdom FAQ: service process, quotes and collaboration, technical operations and more.

contact.seoDesc: Get in touch with JWisdom — software development, system integration, AI applications and digital transformation consulting. Leave your request and a consultant will get back to you soon.
contact.ogDesc: Get in touch with JWisdom — software development, system integration, AI applications and digital transformation consulting.
contact.title: About & Contact
contact.lead: Your technology partner for real-world business. Whether it's a brand-new system, an upgrade of an old one, or on-site integration, leave your request and our consultants will get back to you soon with a free assessment and recommendations.
contact.infoSubtitle: Feel free to reach us through any of the channels below, or fill out the form on the right.
